since_last: 6% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads -0.41%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 6% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.37% · BTC -1.89% · Gold -1.53% · Nasdaq100 -0.19%. 6% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at -0.41%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.41%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.92%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -8.02%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.52% at $150.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.52% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
